message:
style: clippy fixes, formatting improvements, and session index retry race fix

src/autocomplete.rs: Replace if-else with i32::try_from().unwrap_or()
for clamp_usize assertion; use explicit expected array for kind_rank test
to avoid index-cast ambiguity.

src/doctor.rs: Reformat ALL_SEVERITIES array to multi-line; replace
if-else chain with match on Ordering for severity_ordering_total proptest.

src/permissions.rs: Remove unnecessary .clone() on cap in PersistedDecision
construction (clippy::redundant_clone).

src/terminal_images.rs: Use usize::div_ceil() instead of manual
(n * 4 + 2) / 3 ceiling division for base64 length and chunk count
calculations.

src/session_index.rs: Fix retry test race condition where the background
dispatcher could exhaust all retries before the test file was created.
Re-enqueue the snapshot update after creating the file so flush_pending_updates
finds a valid entry to process.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
